title: Smoky Roasted Slovakian Glace Cherry Stir-fry
description: A indulgent slovakian dish featuring glace cherry, smoke, and with a focus on being sour and crispy. Perfect for those following a fodmap-friendly diet.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix chopped onions, garlic, smoked paprika, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Add the Glace cherries and toss well.
Heat oil in a wok or frying pan over medium-high heat. Pour in the cherry mixture and stir-fry until the onions are translucent and slightly golden.
Add sour cream (if using) to the mix, stirring gently to combine with the other ingredients. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the dish into a serving bowl and serve immediately.
Optional: For an extra smoky flavor, you can grill the cherry mixture under high heat for about 1 minute before transferring it to the wok.
